## Summary

- Describe the change.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] `cd go-arena && go test ./...`
- [ ] JavaScript touched: `node --check <file>`
- [ ] Python touched: `python -m compileall <path>`
- [ ] Docs only: links and commands checked

## Public-Repo Safety

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private hostnames, private IPs, or private server paths
- [ ] New assets include source and license/provenance notes
- [ ] New bot/API behavior is reflected in `BOT-GUIDE.md` or `GET /api/v1/bot-setup`

## Notes
Add reviewer context or follow-up work here.
